scripts.dev: npm run prepare:ffmpeg && set PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH% && npm exec --prefix frontend tauri -- dev -c src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.tauri:check: npm run prepare:ffmpeg && set PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH% && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.worker:check: venv\Scripts\python.exe -m py_compile run.py worker\cli.py worker\core.py worker\events.py
